description: 数据集去重与合并工具 - 支持多种数据导入方式（直接输入/URL/Dataset），基于字段组合去重，支持大数据集处理。Dataset Deduplication & Merge Tool - Multiple data sources, field-based dedup, large dataset support.

properties.title: 去重字段 | Dedup Fields
properties.name: fields
properties.description: 用于判断重复的字段名称列表 | Field names for deduplication. Example: ['id'] for dedup by id

properties.title: 数据来源类型 | Data Source Type
properties.name: dataSourceType
properties.description: 选择数据来源 | Select data source

properties.title: 输入数据 | Input Data
properties.name: inputData
properties.description: JSON数组数据 | JSON array data

properties.title: 数据URL列表 | Data URLs
properties.name: inputUrls
properties.description: 数据文件URL列表 | Data file URL list

properties.title: Dataset ID列表 | Dataset IDs
properties.name: datasetIds
properties.description: Cafe Dataset ID列表 | Cafe Dataset ID list

properties.title: 输入文件格式 | Input Format
properties.name: inputFormat
properties.description: 输入数据格式 | Input data format

options.label: 唯一项(去重后) | Unique Items

properties.title: 处理模式 | Processing Mode
properties.name: mode
properties.description: 去重处理模式 | Dedup mode. Large datasets (>100K) use 'As Loading'

options.label: 先加载后去重 | After Load
边加载边去重 | As Loading

properties.title: 仅加载指定字段 | Load Fields Only
properties.name: fieldsToLoad
properties.description: 仅加载指定字段以减少内存 | Load only specified fields

properties.title: 去重前转换函数 | Pre-Dedup Transform
properties.name: preDedupTransformFunction
properties.description: 去重前自定义转换函数 | Custom transform function before dedup

properties.title: 去重后转换函数 | Post-Dedup Transform
properties.name: postDedupTransformFunction
properties.description: 去重后自定义转换函数 | Custom transform function after dedup

properties.title: 自定义输入数据 | Custom Input Data
properties.name: customInputData
properties.description: 传递给转换函数的自定义数据(JSON格式) | Custom data for transform functions (JSON)

properties.title: Null值视为唯一 | Treat Null as Unique
properties.name: nullAsUnique
properties.description: null/undefined值视为唯一值 | Treat null/undefined as unique

properties.title: 并行加载数 | Parallel Loads
properties.name: parallelLoads
properties.description: 并行加载数据源的线程数 | Parallel load threads

properties.title: 并行推送数 | Parallel Pushes
properties.name: parallelPushes
properties.description: 并行推送数据的线程数 | Parallel push threads

properties.title: 批次大小 | Batch Size
properties.name: batchSize
properties.description: 每次处理的批次大小 | Batch size per processing

properties.title: 附加文件来源 | Append File Source
properties.name: appendFileSource
properties.description: 添加__fileSource__字段记录数据来源 | Add __fileSource__ field

properties.title: 详细日志 | Verbose Log
properties.name: verboseLog
properties.description: 开启详细日志输出 | Enable verbose logging
